title: bupleurum falcatum var. genuinum
intro: Bupleurum falcatum var. genuinum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or hare's ear, is a variant of the Bupleurum falcatum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum falcatum var. genuinum include reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney diseases, and enhancing immune function, as well as providing relief from menstrual disorders and anxiety. Bupleurum falcatum var. genuinum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
